title: Kelly Haggerty named Syracuse deputy water commissioner
summary: Mayor Sharon F. Owens appointed Kelly Haggerty as Deputy Commissioner of Water. Haggerty is a Syracuse native with nearly two decades of municipal experience who will help lead the city's water department. This leadership appointment represents organizational change within the water utility.

political_signal.description: Mayoral appointment of experienced municipal professional to deputy commissioner role signals commitment to water department leadership and operations.

processing_notes: Article is appointment announcement with minimal operational detail
No budget, contract, or policy implications detailed
Haggerty's specific background/previous role not specified in excerpt
May warrant tracking for future infrastructure or service initiatives under new leadership
